35.reason: Error: should be lines[t].point2.y = y2; incorrectly assigns to x coordinate

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: should be lines[t].point2.y = y2; incorrectly assigns to x coordinate
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should be lines[t].point2.y = y2; instead of lines[t].point2.x = y2; This causes the y-coordinate of point2 to be incorrectly set to the x-coordinate of the second endpoint, leading to wrong comparisons when checking if segments connect.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  // 错误：应为 lines[t].point2.y = y2; 导致点2的y坐标未设置，连锁判断失败。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  error: should be lines[t].point2.y = y2; typo causes point2.y to remain 0, preventing correct matching of segment endpoints
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Typo: assigns y2 to point2.x instead of point2.y, causing incorrect endpoint storage and subsequent matching failures.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Typo: assigns y2 to point2.x instead of point2.y, causing incorrect endpoint storage and subsequent matching failures.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Typo: previously assigned to .x again instead of .y]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Typo: previously assigned x2 to .x twice; should assign y2 to .y]
